title: Google TPU 8t and 8i is here..
summary: Google has released TPU 8t for training and TPU 8i for inference, served via Virgo Network. The video compares these ASICs against general-purpose GPUs and analyzes how scaling strategies affect the economics of LLM inference and training at scale.
